title: Introduction to System Design for Frontend Developers

questions.sentence: As you move into more senior roles technical interviews will began to include System Design questions
For a front end developer this doesn't just mean back end architecture but also the overall structure of the web application
Key aspects of front end system design include choosing the right framework planning the state management strategy defining the API communication layer and optimizing for performance and scalability
During the interview focus on explaining your high level decisions and the tradeoffs involved in your choices
Being able to think about the Big Picture beyond just typing code is a hallmark of a mature and experienced professional
